description:
A DeepSeek-native coding agent, for your terminal.

Reasonix talks straight to api.deepseek.com. The loop is append-only, engineered around DeepSeek's byte-stable prefix cache — long sessions hold 90%+ cache hit and input-token cost collapses to ~1/5. Terminal-first, leave it running.
What's Changed
- Hide Windows startup probe consoles / 隐藏 Windows 启动探测终端弹窗 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/5661
- Consolidate math rendering fixes / 整合数学渲染修复 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/5662
- feat(desktop): add custom DPI zoom via WebView2 ZoomFactor by @SauronSkywalker in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/5643
- Add host-managed AutoResearch runtime by @CVEngineer66 in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/5657
- Clear stale MCP failure after removal / 删除 MCP 后清理残留失败状态 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/5674
- Recover legacy sidebar projects on upgrade / 升级时恢复旧版侧栏项目 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/5675
Full Changelog: https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/compare/desktop-v1.14.0...desktop-v1.14.1
